svg.title: RLHF vs DPO
svg.desc: Two-path comparison: RLHF (top) uses a separate reward model trained on preference pairs then PPO to optimize the policy with a KL penalty. DPO (bottom) directly optimizes the policy on preference pairs via an implicit reward, with no separate RM or RL loop.

text.font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
